title: Craftable Large Ferns
description: Craft large ferns from small ferns and bone meal. Duplicate large and small ferns with bone meal using a crafting table.
body:
Craft large ferns from small ferns and bone meal. Duplicate large and small ferns in the crafting table with bone meal.
